title: Config File Diff
description:
Two `key=value` config files separated by `---`. Ignore comment lines (starting with `#`) and empty lines.

Return three sections:
```
added key=value ...
removed key=value ...
changed key old->new ...
```
Each section lists its entries space-separated on one line (empty after the keyword if no entries in that section). Keys sorted alphabetically.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.input:
host=localhost
port=5432
debug=true
---
host=db.prod
port=5432
timeout=30
examples.output:
added timeout=30
removed debug=true
changed host=localhost->db.prod
examples.explanation: See test case: Add, remove, change

test_cases.input:
host=localhost
port=5432
debug=true
---
host=db.prod
port=5432
timeout=30
test_cases.expected_output:
added timeout=30
removed debug=true
changed host=localhost->db.prod
